concerns.text: T015 generates 'dataset_counts.md' with 'concrete numbers' but spec.md SC-001 and spec convention state planning docs must defer empirical values (counts, dataset sizes) to implementation phase. Task contradicts spec's [deferred] convention and cannot execute as written.

T032/T033 reference 'combined complexity metric visualization' and 'interpretation' but spec.md FR-005 explicitly focuses on crossing number and braid index as SEPARATE predictors, NOT composite measures. No combined metric is defined in spec, making these tasks unexecutable.

T022 validates 'crossing number and braid index' against KnotInfo per FR-003, but spec.md FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas (not computed). Algorithm validation applies only to Phase 2+ additional invariants. Task contradicts spec.

T018 implements 'precision validation module' for crossing number and braid index, but spec.md User Story 2 and SC-008 clarify core invariants are tabulated (not computed), so precision validation should apply only to Phase 2+ additional invariants. Task contradicts spec.

T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse. Does not name specific files/directories to create. Downstream task_atomizer will need to split into concrete file-creation tasks.

T049 'Additional unit tests in tests/unit/ (test_downloader.py, test_parser.py)' is too vague. Does not name specific test functions or assertions. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without test specifications.

T040 'Record checksums in data/ directory and document in docs/reproducibility/checksums.md' but spec.md FR-007 and Constitution Principle III require checksums recorded UNDER data/ directory with documentation SEPARATELY in docs/reproducibility. Task doesn't explicitly specify both locations clearly enough for execution.

T044 validates hyperbolic volume against KnotInfo but spec.md FR-013 requires source independence assessment (document whether Knot Atlas and KnotInfo share underlying data sources). Task doesn't explicitly include this required output.

T007 implements random seed pinning in code/__init__.py but Constitution Principle I requires seeds pinned in code/ AND documented in docs/reproducibility/random_seeds.md. T050 addresses documentation but T007 doesn't reference the documentation requirement for completeness.
